feed.title: Minchin.ca - Comments: Row Houses — Photo 55 — Project 365

entry.title: Posted by: Wm. Minchin
entry.summary: Bridget, not from a church, but rather there was a ridge that ran above the town I took this from.
entry.content: Bridget, not from a church, but rather there was a ridge that ran above the town I took this from.

entry.title: Posted by: Bridget
entry.summary: This is a beautiful photo - the flashing on the rooftops makes it look almost as if it were painted! Did you take this photo from a church tower?
entry.content: This is a beautiful photo - the flashing on the rooftops makes it look almost as if it were painted! Did you take this photo from a church tower?
